tasks.subject: Task 1: Generalized PKI-operation encode + RenewalReq (17)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Refactor the BC encoder so it can stamp any SCEP messageType over any enveloped payload, and make EncodePkiMessage accept RenewalReq.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter "BcRenewalEncodeTests|BcEncodeTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/ScepAttributes.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BcPkiMessage.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BouncyCastleScepCrypto.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/BcRenewalEncodeTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter \"BcRenewalEncodeTests|BcEncodeTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["RenewalReq encodes with messageType 17 and EnvelopedData content", "existing PKCSReq encode still passes", "NumberFor maps all six message types"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: GetCert (21) & GetCRL (22) encode + IssuerAndSerial on PkiMessage
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Carry an issuer/serial on PkiMessage and encode GetCert/GetCRL as an IssuerAndSerialNumber enveloped to the CA and signed.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter BcGetCertCrlEncodeTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.CryptoApi/PkiMessage.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BcPkiMessage.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BouncyCastleScepCrypto.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/BcGetCertCrlEncodeTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter BcGetCertCrlEncodeTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GetCert encodes messageType 21", "GetCrl encodes messageType 22", "inner IssuerAndSerialNumber serial round-trips"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: GetCRL response decode (CRL extraction) + TestCa CRL helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Decode a CertRep whose enveloped degenerate PKCS#7 carries a CRL, populating PkiMessage.IssuedCrls. Add the test CA's CRL helpers + a shared EnvelopeAndSign refactor.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter "BcCrlDecodeTests|BcDecodeTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BcPkiMessage.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/Fakes/TestCa.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/BcCrlDecodeTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter \"BcCrlDecodeTests|BcDecodeTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CRL extracted from CertRep into IssuedCrls", "existing cert CertRep decode still passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ScepRequestBuilder fluent API
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A fluent composer that builds a ready-to-encode PkiMessage for any operation, generating the subject/transient key from a KeySpec and surfacing it.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter ScepRequestBuilderTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Core/ScepRequestBuilder.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/ScepRequestBuilderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter ScepRequestBuilderTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PKCSReq build populates CSR + algos + key", "RenewalReq build wires signer cert/key", "GetCert build sets issuer/serial transient signer", "invalid build returns false+error"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ScepClient.Renew — the 5 renewal variants (sync+async)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Unify the send/decode path into one SendPkiOperation, add SubjectKey to EnrollOutcome, and add Renew(RenewRequest) covering all five variants. Route the fake server POST by message type and enforce signer-cert validity.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter "RenewalTests|EndToEndTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Core/RenewalVariant.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/RenewRequest.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/EnrollOutcome.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/ScepClient.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/Fakes/TestCa.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/Fakes/FakeScepServer.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/RenewalTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter \"RenewalTests|EndToEndTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 success variants return a cert", "Expired variant rejected with BadRequest", "SameKey reuses existing key", "enroll tests still pass post-refactor"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ScepClient.GetCert (21) & GetCrl (22) (sync+async)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Retrieve an existing certificate by issuer+serial and fetch a CRL end-to-end, with the fake CA handling both. Includes SendDecoded* and a ResolveCaCert cache.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter GetCertCrlTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Core/ScepClient.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/Fakes/TestCa.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/GetCertCrlTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter GetCertCrlTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GetCert returns previously issued cert", "GetCrl returns parseable CRL", "unknown serial yields ServerFailure", "sync+async both present"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Standalone ScepClient.Poll — CertPoll (20) (sync+async)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Encode CertPoll (IssuerAndSubject payload), add Poll/PollAsync, and let the fake CA satisfy a poll by issuing for the polled subject.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter PollTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BcPkiMessage.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BouncyCastleScepCrypto.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/ScepClient.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/Fakes/TestCa.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/PollTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter PollTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CertPoll encodes messageType 20 + IssuerAndSubject", "Poll returns a cert for the subject", "supplied txn is stamped"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Key import + CertStore lineage & Load
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Let a stored cert sign its own renewal: import a PKCS#8 private key back into an IScepKey, persist renewedFrom/transactionId/status, expose a core Save overload + Load/FindServerForCert.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter "KeyImportTests|CertStoreLineageTests"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.CryptoApi/IScepCrypto.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BouncyCastleScepCrypto.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/Storage/CertStore.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/KeyImportTests.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/CertStoreLineageTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter \"KeyImportTests|CertStoreLineageTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["PKCS#8 export/import round-trips", "lineage fields persisted", "Load + FindServerForCert work", "Phase-1 Save overload unchanged"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Create(existingCert) factory + high-level RenewCertificate orchestration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Seed a renewal context from an existing cert/key and add the casual renew <cert-id> flow: load, fetch CA cert, renew variant Proper, store with renewedFrom.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter RenewLifecycleTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Core/ScepClient.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/RenewLifecycleTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter RenewLifecycleTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Create(existingCert) seeds renewal context", "RenewCertificate chains RenewedFrom lineage", "failed renew writes no new cert dir"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Encrypted PKCS#8 key storage (--encrypt-keys)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add passphrase-encrypted PKCS#8 export/import to the provider and let CertStore write/read key.pkcs8.enc when a passphrase is supplied.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter EncryptedKeyTests

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.CryptoApi/IScepCrypto.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Crypto.BouncyCastle/BouncyCastleScepCrypto.cs", "src/ScepTestClient.Core/Storage/CertStore.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/EncryptedKeyTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter EncryptedKeyTests", "acceptanceCriteria": ["encrypted PKCS#8 round-trips", "wrong passphrase returns false no throw", "Save writes .enc not plaintext; Load reads it", "default plaintext unchanged"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: CLI wiring — getcacert/enroll/renew/getcert/getcrl/poll + --encrypt-keys
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose the Phase-2 operations on the sceptest CLI and fill remaining per-op gaps, with usage + an end-to-end routing test. Final full build + test sweep.

**Verify:** dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter CliRouterPhase2Tests; then dotnet build IntuneSimulator.sln -c Debug; then dotnet test IntuneSimulator.sln

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/ScepTestClient.Cli/CommandRouter.cs", "tests/ScepTestClient.Tests/CliRouterPhase2Tests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test tests/ScepTestClient.Tests --filter CliRouterPhase2Tests && dotnet build IntuneSimulator.sln -c Debug && dotnet test IntuneSimulator.sln", "acceptanceCriteria": ["all 7 new commands route", "renew finds server + prints new cert id", "getcert/getcrl arg validation", "usage lists new commands", "end-to-end get+renew exits 0", "full solution build+test green 0 warnings"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
